_instructions.overview: List every component of your quad. The sim computes total mass and center-of-mass from this list.
_instructions.geometry: For 3D-printed parts, drop your .3mf or .stl file into inputs/stl/ and reference it here. The sim will read geometry, infill density, and material automatically from the .3mf slicer config.

3mf_fields.file_3mf: Filename of the .3mf export from your slicer (PrusaSlicer, BambuStudio, OrcaSlicer, Cura all supported).
3mf_fields.material: Fallback material if not auto-detected: PLA, PETG, ABS, ASA, TPU, NYLON, PETG-CF, PLA-CF
3mf_fields.infill_percent: Fallback infill % if not auto-detected (e.g. 20). Set explicitly if you used different infill for different parts.
3mf_fields.wall_factor: Fraction of part volume that is solid shell regardless of infill (default 0.25). Increase for parts with many perimeters.

stl_fields.stl_file: Fallback if no .3mf is available. Requires manual material_density_kg_m3.
stl_fields.material_density_kg_m3: Effective printed density. For 20% PLA infill: ~450. For solid PLA: 1240.

_instructions.position_m: +x=forward, +y=left, +z=up in meters from the geometric center of the frame.
_instructions.mass_g: Used only if no geometry file is provided (e.g. bought components). Set to null if mass is computed from the 3mf/stl.

components.name: motor_fl

components.name: center_assembly
components._note: center body which holds all circuitry, battery, and prop arms
